verdict: Moderate risk of AI displacement, with some tasks becoming more routine and others being augmented by AI.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine Cognition
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 1, 2, 4, and 6 involve routine data analysis and pattern-matching on text/data, which are already being handled by current frontier LLMs.

reasoning_steps.title: Creative Judgment
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 3, 5, and 11 require original synthesis, novel problem framing, and taste, which are less susceptible to AI displacement.

reasoning_steps.title: Regulatory Moat
reasoning_steps.body: The regulatory moat is relatively strong due to the importance of environmental laws and the need for human expertise in enforcing them.

reasoning_steps.title: Embodied Work
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 1, 2, and 4 involve working in natural environments, which are less likely to be automated by AI.

adjacent_careers.name: Wildlife Biologist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Similar tasks and expertise, with some overlap in data analysis and species classification.

adjacent_careers.name: Conservation Biologist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Similar focus on species conservation and management, but with more emphasis on policy and advocacy.

adjacent_careers.name: Marine Scientist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Some overlap in marine research and data analysis, but with more emphasis on oceanography and chemistry.

recent_developments.headline: New AI-powered tool helps marine biologists analyze species distribution
recent_developments.impact: May augment some tasks, but not replace human expertise in species classification and conservation.

recent_developments.headline: AlphaFold reshapes structural biology research
recent_developments.impact: Predicted protein structures are now a default starting point for experimental design.

quotes.quote: AlphaFold has predicted the structure of nearly every known protein. Tasks that took a PhD student years now take seconds. The bottleneck has moved to the experiments and the questions.
quotes.speaker: Demis Hassabis
quotes.title: CEO, Google DeepMind; Nobel laureate in Chemistry 2024

quotes.quote: AI is the most profound technology humanity is working on, more profound than fire or electricity. In science it is already changing what is knowable.
quotes.speaker: Sundar Pichai
quotes.title: CEO, Google / Alphabet

quotes.quote: I can imagine a world where AI agents run thousands of experiments in parallel, and the human scientist's role becomes one of asking the right question and interpreting the result.
quotes.speaker: Fei-Fei Li
quotes.title: Co-Director, Stanford Institute for Human-Centered AI
quotes.source: The Worlds I See / public lectures
